decisions.v3_scope: Minimal seed — each phase creates its own data via UI during testing
decisions.v3_content: enterprise003 user + enterprise record + carbon coin account + credit score. Add AUTHENTICATOR(5) to user_type_list. Check and fix missing tables (rsa_key_pairs, operation_log, emission_rating).
decisions.v3_role_fix: Fix AUTHENTICATOR(5) gap only. Defer VERIFIER/CERTIFIER to Phase 4 investigation.
decisions.dev_stack: Infrastructure Docker (MySQL/Redis/MinIO) + local dev (backend mvn spring-boot:run, frontend npm run dev)
decisions.docker_check: Check Docker Desktop running as entry criteria, prompt user if not
decisions.jwt_strategy: Short expiry (default 45min) + manual re-login. One Incognito window per role.
decisions.jwt_refresh: Skip refresh testing in Phase 1. Focus on login → access → logout.
decisions.jwt_logout: Verify logout blacklists token — old token returns 401 after logout.
decisions.health_check: Automated script checking all 5 services (MySQL, Redis, MinIO, Backend Swagger, Frontend). Fast-fail on first error.
decisions.health_flyway: Include Flyway verification: 21 tables + V3 seed data present.
